我每次入一隻新股，至少睇晒以下所有野:
1) all fundamentals: cash flow statement, income statement, balance sheet, basic ratios, earnings/revenue
2) chart, price/volume history, 見到有特別既地方就睇下當時發生咗咩事
3) due diligence, 起間公司同management (CEO CFO Founder) 底，睇下咩料, google + linkedin + wiki, wiki page連history都check埋
4) 睇investor relations website, SEC filings, latest earning call transcript
5) youtube+google+glassdoor 睇其他人/佢D staff 點講呢間公司，搵competitor comparison review
6) 問清楚自己，係咪真係想接手呢壇生意，如果比你自己攪，你覺得未來5 - 10年呢壇野有冇得愈做愈大，生產更多價值?
